titleZh: 李淑君、吴湘、孙杰、王国兴诉江苏佳德置业发展有限公司股东知情权纠纷案
titleEn: Gazette Case: Li Shujun, Wu Xiang, Sun Jie, and Wang Guoxing v. Jiangsu Jiade Real Estate Development Co., Ltd.
holdingZh: 股东提起知情权之诉应符合公司法规定的书面请求前置程序；公司以股东具有不正当目的抗辩的，应就该目的负举证责任；对会计账簿的知情权原则上限于查阅，不当然包括复制。
holdingEn: A shareholder-inspection action requires compliance with the statutory written-demand prerequisite; the company bears the burden of proving an improper purpose; and inspection of accounting books generally means access rather than an automatic right to copy.
